deprecations.impact: Using 'mode:' silently prevents the slash command from registering. The prompt file appears to exist but is never invocable.
Still works but officially deprecated since VS Code 1.102. Will likely be removed in a future release.
Prompt files still work but VS Code docs now recommend skills for complex multi-step workflows. Prompts remain valid for simple entrypoints.

deprecations.what: Claude Code snake_case tool input properties in VS Code hooks
deprecations.replacedBy: VS Code camelCase tool input properties
deprecations.impact: Hook scripts written for Claude Code (file_path, content) will not work in VS Code (filePath). VS Code also ignores Claude matcher syntax entirely.

deprecations.what: Hard-coded model names in agent/prompt frontmatter
deprecations.replacedBy: Omitting model field (uses workspace default) or using model picker
deprecations.impact: Model availability changes over time. Hard-coded model names may silently fail or use fallback when the specified model is removed or renamed.
